title: Dhammapada, Chapter 25: The Monk
description: Chapter 25 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 25 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: Restraint of the eye is good. Good is restraint of the ear. Restraint of the nose is good. Good is restraint of the tongue.
